# Sean Yu

> Co-founder and CEO of Peony (peony.ink). Former VC at Backed VC and growth-equity investor at Target Global. Expert in venture capital, startups, SaaS go-to-market, cross-border trade, and online scaling.

## Current

- Co-founder & CEO of Peony (https://peony.ink) — modern data room platform
- Peony serves 3,400+ teams managing $4.5B+ in client assets
- Peony founded 2021, launched August 2025
- Previously raised $2.1M for Gingercontrol (cross-border trade)

## Career

- M&A at Nomura (investment banking)
- Venture capital at Backed VC (early-stage European startups)
- Growth equity at Target Global (late-stage, secondary transactions)
- Founded Gingercontrol (import/export, raised $2.1M)
- Co-founded Peony (2021–present)

## Expertise

- Venture Capital: fundraising, LP/GP dynamics, deal structuring, secondary transactions, continuation vehicles
- Startups: zero-to-one building, product-market fit, capital-efficient growth
- SaaS Go-to-Market: PLG, content-led growth, cold outreach at scale, pricing strategy
- Import/Export: cross-border trade, international logistics, supplier management
- Online Scaling: SEO (4x traffic growth), GEO (AI search optimization), conversion optimization

## Advisory

- Advised SaaS companies to $20M ARR
- Advised Lucida Capital ($35M AUM hedge fund / market maker)

## Investors in Peony

- Matt Clifford (co-founder Entrepreneur First, chair of ARIA)
- Charlie Songhurst (former Head of Strategy, Microsoft)
- Backed VC
- Possible Ventures

## Contact

- Email: sean@peony.ink
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sean-yu-98839a180/
- Company: https://peony.ink
